# Theodore Meynard

Theodore Meynard is a Berlin-based machine learning leader specializing in ranking, search relevance, recommendations, marketplace optimization, experimentation, MLOps, and ML platform engineering.

He leads Ranking & Search Relevance at GetYourGuide. His public work covers large-scale marketplace ranking, learning-to-rank, deep learning ranking models, real-time inference, ML platforms, CI/CD for machine learning, data testing, data science management, and PyData community organization.

## Canonical Pages

- Profile: https://theopinard.github.io/about-me/
- Blog: https://theopinard.github.io/about-me/blog/
- Talks: https://theopinard.github.io/about-me/talks/
- Community: https://theopinard.github.io/about-me/community/

## Selected Articles

- From trees to transformers: adopting deep learning for activity ranking: https://theopinard.github.io/about-me/blog/2025-from-trees-to-transformers/
- From Batch to Real-time: The Incremental MLOps Journey at GetYourGuide: https://theopinard.github.io/about-me/blog/2023-from-batch-to-real-time-the-incremental-mlops-journey-at-getyourguide/
- DDataflow: An Open-Source Tool for End-to-End Tests of Machine Learning Pipelines: https://theopinard.github.io/about-me/blog/2023-ddataflow/
- How We Extended Our Open Source ML Platform to Support Real-Time Inference: https://theopinard.github.io/about-me/blog/2022-how-we-extended-our-open-source-ml-platform-to-support-real-time-inference/
- Laying the Foundation of Our Open Source ML Platform with a Modern CI/CD Pipeline: https://theopinard.github.io/about-me/blog/2021-laying-the-foundation-of-our-open-source-ml-platform-with-a-modern-ci-cd-pipeline/
